# Dadparvaran Mehr Iran Legal Institute
# مؤسسه حقوقی دادپروران مهر ایران

> A professional legal services institute based in Iran, providing expert legal consultation, representation, and educational resources through a team of licensed first-class attorneys.

## About

Dadparvaran Mehr Iran Legal Institute offers comprehensive legal services across civil, criminal, family, and commercial law. The institute operates three offices in Tehran, Ahvaz, and Andimeshk, serving clients nationwide.

## Services

- Civil Law (حقوق مدنی): Property disputes, contracts, debt recovery
- Criminal Law (حقوق کیفری): Defense, complaints, appeals
- Family Law (حقوق خانواده): Divorce, custody, alimony, dowry (مهریه)
- Commercial Law (حقوق تجاری): Company formation, partnerships, bankruptcy
- Labor Law (حقوق کار): Employment disputes, social security
- Real Estate Law (حقوق ملکی): Property transactions, construction disputes
- Insurance Law (حقوق بیمه): Claims, liability
- Administrative Law (حقوق اداری): Government disputes, licensing
- Banking Law (حقوق بانکی): Financial disputes, guarantees

## Legal Tools

- Inflation Adjustment Calculator (محاسبه‌گر تعدیل تورمی): Adjusts monetary values based on Central Bank of Iran price indices
- Diye Calculator (محاسبه‌گر دیه): Calculates blood money amounts per Iranian law
- Legal Deadline Calculator (محاسبه‌گر مهلت قانونی): Computes legal deadlines accounting for holidays

## Content

- Legal articles and educational blog posts (مقالات حقوقی)
- Full text of Iranian laws and regulations (قوانین)
- Legal deadline reference database (مهلت‌های قانونی)

- Phone: +98 61 9101 0285

### Andimeshk Office
Panahi St., 2nd Floor, Abadi Passage, Andimeshk, Khuzestan, Iran

- Persian (فارسی) - Primary
- English - Secondary
